pricing.depositReassure: Fully returned at the end, minus any damage.
pricing.dueAtPickup: €{amount} to start (first 30 days + refundable deposit) — due after you're approved & have accepted the contract
pricing.recurringNote: Then €{amount} every 30 days — invoiced before each period.

fleet.heading: {count} bikes. One simple plan.
fleet.lead: From the moto-style Engine Pro to easy folding fat-tyre bikes — every model rents on the same 30-day, 6 or 12-month terms.

howItWorks.heading: From reserve to first shift in four steps.

01.title: Reserve your bike — free
01.copy: Pick your city, model and plan. Check live availability, read the rental rules and see your exact price and deposit. Send your request — no payment, no signing.

02.title: We hold a bike for you
02.copy: We confirm you are a real courier and reserve a specific bike for you, usually within 24 hours. You receive a secure portal link by email.

03.title: Sign & pay
03.copy: You sign the rental agreement in person at pickup — this makes it legally binding. Then pay your first 30 days and the refundable deposit.

04.title: Pick up and start delivering
04.copy: Collect your bike at a city pickup point or request local delivery. Your bike and charger are ready at handover; optional paid add-ons are set up only if you selected them.

trust.copy: Your agreement is signed and your rental is confirmed — legally binding and ready to ride.

cities.heading: Live in {live}.
cities.lead: Real-time availability across our launch markets. Reserve in seconds, pick up the same week.

packages.policy: Only the charger is included with every bike. All gear below is optional and paid per 30-day period.
packages.loadError: Current package prices could not be loaded.

service.heading: Your bike is your income tool. We keep it moving.
service.copy: Brake adjustments, punctures and general maintenance are part of every plan. If a bike needs longer repair we replace it where stock allows — your shifts keep running. Damage and theft follow a clear process you sign for up front.

stats.citiesLabel: Cities live{soonState, select, some{ · {soon} soon} other{}}

delivery.q: Can I use the bike for delivery work?
delivery.a: Yes. The rentaro fleet is built for city delivery shifts and suits couriers on any major platform. We are an independent rental service and are not officially affiliated with any delivery platform.

minPeriod.q: What is the minimum rental period?
minPeriod.a: 30 days. After your first month you can extend month-to-month or switch to a longer plan with a lower daily rate.

pricing.a: Pricing is per 30-day period. Your first payment covers the first 30 days, the refundable deposit and any optional paid add-ons you selected. Charger and service support are included with the bike; extra batteries, bags, locks and other gear are separate add-ons.

maintenance.a: Yes. Brake adjustments, puncture handling and routine service support are included in every plan. Damage, theft or misuse follows the rental rules; if a bike needs longer service, we replace it where stock allows.

extraBattery.a: No. The bike comes with its normal battery and charger. An extra battery is available as an optional paid add-on for long delivery days.

deposit.a: A refundable security deposit equal to your bike's 30-day price is taken at pickup — the exact amount is shown during booking. It is returned at the end of your rental minus any damage beyond fair wear.

pickup.q: Where can I pick up the bike?
pickup.a: We operate in {live} today{soonState, select, some{, with {soon} coming soon} other{}}. Collect at a city pickup point or request local delivery in your area.

contract.q: How do I sign the contract?
contract.a: You sign the rental agreement in person at pickup. After approval we also email you the contract, so you can sign it yourself in advance — on paper, or digitally with DigiDoc / Smart-ID — and upload the signed copy in your rental portal.

finalCta.heading: Ready for your next shift?
finalCta.lead: Choose your rentaro e-bike, pick a plan and start riding — service support included from day one.

booking.title: Reserve your e-bike
booking.intro: {n} quick steps to reserve your delivery bike. No payment and no signing now — once we approve your booking, you sign the rental agreement and pay before pickup.

meta.titleSoon: E-bike rental in {city} — coming soon · rentaro
meta.descriptionSoon: rentaro is bringing delivery-ready monthly e-bike rental to {city}, {country}. Join the waitlist for launch dates and pickup details.
meta.descriptionLive: Rent a delivery-built e-bike by the month in {city}, {country}. 30-day, 6 and 12-month plans with service support and charger included; accessories are optional paid add-ons.

popular.heading: Bikes couriers reach for first.
popular.leadBase: Every rentaro e-bike rents on the same terms — 30-day, 6 or 12-month plans with service support and charger included.
popular.leadSoon: These bikes arrive in {city} at launch.
popular.leadLive: Pick the one that fits your shifts.

finalCta.copySoon: Join the waitlist and we'll let you know the moment delivery-ready e-bikes land in {city}.
finalCta.copyLive: Choose your model, pick a plan and start delivering in {city} this week — charger and service support included from day one.

tallinn.headline: Monthly e-bike rental in Tallinn.
tallinn.intro: Tallinn is where rentaro started, and it is still where most of our fleet lives. If you ride through Kesklinn, Telliskivi, Kalamaja, Põhja-Tallinn or Lasnamäe, you already know the city rewards a fast, dependable e-bike. We rent delivery-built e-bikes by the month — charger and service support included, accessories optional — so you can start earning without sinking a thousand euros into a bike of your own.
whyHere: Kesklinn lunch and dinner rushes pay best when you can cut between drops — an e-bike turns short, dense routes into back-to-back orders.
Telliskivi, Kalamaja and Põhja-Tallinn mix cobbles, tram tracks and quiet side streets; our bikes are picked to stay sure-footed on all of it.
Long runs out to Lasnamäe, Mustamäe and Kristiine are easier when the motor does the climbing and an optional extra battery covers longer delivery days.
Estonian winters are real — dark, wet and icy. Winter tyres are available as a paid add-on, while service support is part of the plan.
Same-week pickup in the centre means a newly-arrived courier can land in Tallinn and be delivering within days, not weeks.
One monthly price covers the bike, charger and service support — less cash risk than buying a used bike off the classifieds.
tallinn.pickupNote: Collect your bike at the pickup point shown in the availability card, or ask about local handover. We walk you through the bike, charger and any optional add-ons you selected before your first shift.

rentVsBuy.heading: Why couriers here rent instead of buying.
rentVsBuy.lead: A lot of Tallinn couriers are new in town or riding for a season. Tying up cash in a used bike — and owning every repair — rarely makes sense when your bike is the thing that earns.

points.title: No big outlay to start
points.copy: A delivery-capable e-bike can cost well over a thousand euros to buy before you add seasonal gear. Renting starts at €177 for your first 30 days and you are on the road with the bike, charger and service support included.

points.title: Service support is built in
points.copy: Brake adjustments, puncture handling and wear-related service support are part of the plan. A used bike off the classifieds can turn into your workshop bill the moment something fails mid-shift.

points.title: No resale headache when you leave
points.copy: Plenty of couriers ride Tallinn for a season. When you're done you hand the bike back — no listing it, no haggling, no selling at a loss in a soft second-hand market.

points.title: Long repairs do not have to stop a shift
points.copy: If a bike needs longer service, we swap it where stock allows. Owning one bike means owning its downtime too.

winter.heading: The cold months are when it pays to be ready.
winter.lead: Tallinn winters are dark, wet and icy, and demand often climbs right when conditions get worst. The riders who keep earning are the ones whose bikes are set up for it.

points.title: Winter tyres on request
points.copy: Grippier winter tyres are available as an add-on for slush, black ice and the long Estonian off-season — far steadier than summer rubber on a December morning.

points.title: Battery care for the cold
points.copy: Cold weather is hard on every e-bike battery. We show you how to store and charge it warm, and an optional extra battery helps on long, cold shifts.

points.title: Service support through the season
points.copy: Salt, grit and freeze-thaw wear bikes out faster. Maintenance is included year-round, so winter doesn't quietly turn into a string of repair bills.

pickup.heading: From reserved to riding in a few days.

steps.title: Reserve online
steps.copy: Pick your model and plan and send the request. No payment up front — we confirm a bike is ready for you in Tallinn and send your rental agreement to read in advance.

steps.title: Collect at the current pickup point
steps.copy: Come to the current city pickup point shown above, or ask about local handover. We set up the bike, charger and any optional add-ons you selected.

steps.title: Start your first shift
steps.copy: Leave with the bike charged and ready. If you selected winter tyres, a delivery bag, phone holder, lock or extra battery, we set those up before handover.

items.q: Can I use the bike for Bolt or Wolt in Tallinn?
items.a: Yes — the fleet is built for city delivery shifts and suits couriers on any major platform in Tallinn. We're an independent rental service and aren't officially affiliated with Bolt, Wolt or any delivery platform.

items.q: Where do I pick the bike up?
items.a: From the pickup point shown on this page, or ask about local handover. We hand the bike over in person and set it up with you.

items.q: Is it ready for Tallinn winters?
items.a: Yes. Winter tyres are available as an optional paid add-on and service support is included year-round. We also show you how to look after the battery in the cold.

items.q: I just moved to Tallinn — can I start quickly?
items.a: That's exactly who monthly rental suits. Reserve online, sign in person at pickup and collect in the centre — most couriers are delivering within the same week, with no large purchase first.

riga.headline: Monthly e-bike rental in Riga.
riga.intro: Riga couriers cover serious ground — from Centrs and Vecrīga across the river to Āgenskalns and Pārdaugava. A monthly rentaro e-bike keeps that cost predictable, with charger and service support included and paid add-ons available only when you need them.
whyHere: Wide boulevards and long cross-river routes — an e-bike turns big distances into easy ones.
One simple monthly price instead of fuel, parking and the cost of an unreliable bike.
Optional extra batteries are available for couriers stitching together full days across the city.
Local service support so small issues get fixed fast and you stay on the road.
riga.pickupNote: Pick up at the current city pickup point, or arrange local handover. We set up the bike, charger and any optional add-ons you selected before you ride.

helsinki.headline: Monthly e-bike rental in Helsinki — coming soon.
helsinki.intro: Helsinki is next on the rentaro map. We are lining up a delivery-ready fleet for couriers working Kallio, Punavuori and the wider city — same monthly plans, charger included, service support included and optional paid add-ons for longer shifts.
whyHere: Strong cycling infrastructure makes Helsinki a natural fit for delivery e-bikes.
Year-round riders need bikes ready for cold, wet and dark winter shifts — that is what we build for.
Monthly plans give full-time couriers a predictable cost, with optional paid extra batteries for long days.
Service support is part of the plan from the day we go live.
helsinki.pickupNote: Helsinki pickup points are being finalised. Join the waitlist and we will share collection details and a launch date as soon as the fleet is ready.

pricing.heading: One daily rate. Billed every 30 days.
pricing.lead: Every rentaro e-bike rents on the same simple terms — pick a 30-day, 6 or 12-month plan and pay the daily rate × 30. Charger and service support are included; accessories are optional paid add-ons.

howItWorks.heading: Reserve, sign, pay, ride.
howItWorks.lead: Reserve free. Once approved, read and sign the rental agreement, pay your first 30 days plus deposit, then collect the bike with its charger. Add accessories only if you need them.

faq.heading: Everything you need to know.
faq.lead: The most common questions about monthly e-bike rental for delivery work — plans, deposits, service support, charger, optional add-ons and pickup.

accessories.heading: Gear that earns shifts.
accessories.lead: Add only the kit that fits your routine. Extra batteries, delivery bags, phone holders, locks, helmets, rain covers and winter tyres are optional paid add-ons; the charger is included with every bike.

modelsPage.heading: All models.
modelsPage.lead: Every rentaro e-bike rents on the same simple terms — 30-day, 6 or 12-month plans with service support and charger included. Accessories stay optional, so you pick the bike and gear that fit your shifts.
modelsPage.planNote: Available on 30-day, 6 or 12-month plans — €{daily}/day on the 12-month plan.

engine-pro.blurb: 750W (1200W peak) rear hub motor, torque sensor and full suspension on 20×4.0 fat tires. Built to carry loads through full delivery days, on any surface.

engwe-ep-2-boost.tagline: Folding fat-tyre e-bike, easy to start on
engwe-ep-2-boost.blurb: A folding fat-tyre e-bike that's easy to start delivery work on — simple, stable and quick to store between shifts. 250 W motor, Shimano 7-speed and mechanical disc brakes.

engwe-m1.tagline: Moto-style e-bike for long daily shifts
engwe-m1.blurb: A moto-style delivery e-bike built for long daily courier shifts — a sturdy steel frame, hydraulic disc brakes and dual suspension keep you comfortable mile after mile.

engwe-engine-pro-3.blurb: The premium pick for the most demanding delivery days — full suspension, hydraulic dual-piston brakes, a torque-sensor motor and built-in GPS anti-theft.

specTable.rangeNote: Range is a manufacturer estimate — real distance varies with load, terrain, weather and rider.

hero.heading: Rent the bike. Skip the price tag.
hero.lead: Monthly e-bike rental is the simplest way onto a quality delivery bike without buying one. You pay a clear daily rate, billed every 30 days. The bike, charger and service support are included; extra batteries, locks, bags and other gear stay optional paid add-ons.

predictablePrice.title: One predictable price
predictablePrice.copy: Pay a daily rate billed every 30 days. No big upfront purchase, no surprise repair bills — you know exactly what the bike costs each month.

repairsOnUs.title: Service support is built in
repairsOnUs.copy: Routine service support is part of every plan. Brake adjustments, puncture handling and wear-related fixes are handled by us, while damage or misuse follows the rental rules.

commitFlexible.title: Commit as little or as long as you like
commitFlexible.copy: Start on a 30-day plan to test it, then move to a 6 or 12-month plan for a lower daily rate when you're ready. The longer the term, the less you pay per day.

nothingTiedUp.title: Nothing tied up in a bike
nothingTiedUp.copy: Buying an e-bike ties up cash in the bike, seasonal gear and future maintenance. Renting keeps your cash free and leaves service support with us.

models.heading: Bikes you can rent today.
models.lead: Every bike in the fleet rents on the same monthly terms. Browse the most popular picks below, or see the full range.

cta.heading: Start your monthly plan.
cta.lead: Pick a bike, choose a 30-day, 6 or 12-month plan and reserve in a few steps — no payment now, service support from day one.

meta.title: Monthly e-bike rental — rentaro
meta.description: Rent a delivery-built e-bike by the month instead of buying one. From €177 for your first 30 days covers the bike, charger and service support; accessories are optional paid add-ons. Tallinn, Riga and Helsinki.

compare.heading: Keep your cash. Skip the workshop bills.
compare.lead: Buying a delivery-grade e-bike means a big payment up front and every repair on you. Renting by the month turns that into one predictable cost — and someone else owns the maintenance.

rent.title: Renting monthly
items: From €177 for your first 30 days — no €1,000+ purchase before you can earn.
Bike, charger and service support included in the price.
Routine service support handled for you; a replacement bike where stock allows.
Cancel after 30 days, or move to a longer plan for a lower daily rate.
Hand the bike back when you're done — no resale, no depreciation.

buy.title: Buying your own
items: €1,000+ up front, plus a lock, charger and winter tyres on top.
Every puncture, brake and worn part is your bill and your downtime.
A breakdown mid-shift can cost you a full day of orders.
Value drops the day you ride it; you're tied to one bike.
When you stop or move on, you have to sell it yourself.

how.heading: On a bike in three steps.
how.lead: A monthly plan is built to be quick to start and easy to stop. Reserve in minutes, sign at pickup and ride.

included.heading: Bike, charger and support included.
included.lead: Your monthly price covers the bike, its charger and service support. Accessories stay optional, so you add only the gear your shifts actually need.

bike.title: A delivery-ready e-bike
bike.copy: A bike picked for city delivery work — strong motor, real payload and built to handle full days on the road.

service.title: Service support
service.copy: Brake adjustments, puncture handling and wear-related maintenance are part of the plan. Off the road longer? We replace the bike where stock allows.

lockCharger.title: Charger included
lockCharger.copy: A charger comes with every plan, so you can top it up at home between shifts.

swap.title: Optional add-ons when needed
swap.copy: Extend month to month, switch to a longer plan for a lower daily rate, or add paid gear such as an extra battery, delivery bag, phone holder or lock.

firstPayment.q: How much do I pay to start?
firstPayment.a: Your first 30 days on the flexible plan start from €177 (€5.90/day × 30), plus a refundable deposit and any optional paid add-ons you selected. No payment is taken when you reserve.

cancel.q: Can I cancel after a month?
cancel.a: Yes. The minimum is 30 days. After that you can stop and return the bike, continue month to month, or move to a 6 or 12-month plan for a lower daily rate.

deposit.a: Yes — a refundable security deposit equal to your bike's 30-day price (shown exactly during booking), taken at pickup and returned at the end minus any damage beyond fair wear.

extend.q: What if I want to keep the bike longer?
extend.a: Just extend. Stay flexible month to month, or switch to a 6 or 12-month plan and your daily rate drops to €4.90 or €3.90 — the longer the commitment, the less you pay per day.

hero.heading: An e-bike built for the job.
hero.lead: Delivery riding is hard on a bike: long hours, heavy loads and every kind of weather. rentaro rents delivery-built e-bikes by the month, with charger and service support included. Paid add-ons such as an extra battery, delivery bag, phone holder or lock are optional.

builtToCarry.title: Built to carry, not to cruise
builtToCarry.copy: Strong motors, real torque and high payload limits. These bikes are chosen for racks, bags and long days under load — not for a relaxed weekend ride.

downtimeCosts.title: Downtime costs you money
downtimeCosts.copy: Your bike is your income tool, so service support is built into every plan. We keep it moving with fast fixes and optional extra batteries for back-to-back shifts.

readyForWeather.title: Ready for any weather
readyForWeather.copy: Hydraulic brakes, durable tyres and frames picked for daily city use — rain, cobbles and winter slush included. The bike turns up ready for the shift.

cityDelivery.title: Suitable for city delivery work
cityDelivery.copy: Whatever app or service you ride for, these bikes are set up for urban delivery: nimble in traffic, comfortable over distance and easy to lock up between drops.

models.heading: The bikes couriers reach for.
models.lead: Power, payload and stamina that hold up to full delivery days. Browse the most popular delivery setups, or see the full fleet.

cta.heading: Gear up for your next shift.
cta.lead: Choose a delivery-ready e-bike and a plan, then reserve in a few steps — charger and service support included, paid add-ons optional.

meta.title: Delivery e-bike rental — rentaro
meta.description: Delivery-built e-bikes you can rent by the month, with charger and service support included. Add optional paid gear such as an extra battery, delivery bag, phone holder or lock for courier work in Tallinn, Riga and Helsinki.

gear.heading: Kit the bike out for the work.
gear.lead: Delivery is won on the details. Add only the accessories you need — each one is an optional paid add-on available with your plan.

battery.title: Extra battery
battery.copy: A spare pack for long or back-to-back shifts, so a low battery never ends your day early. Swap in seconds and keep taking orders.

bag.title: Delivery bag
bag.copy: A sturdy, insulated bag sized for food and parcels — keeps orders secure and stable during city delivery work.

phone.title: Phone holder
phone.copy: A firm handlebar mount so your map and order screen stay in view and in place over cobbles, kerbs and tram tracks.

lock.title: Heavy-duty lock
lock.copy: A strong lock for the seconds your bike sits unattended at every drop. Park with confidence and get back to earning.

how.heading: From signup to first delivery.
how.lead: Getting on a delivery bike is built to be fast. Choose your model and plan, then sign and pick up your bike — service support included from day one.

uptime.q: What happens if my bike breaks down?
uptime.a: Service support is part of every plan. Brakes, punctures and general maintenance are covered, and if a bike needs a longer repair we replace it where stock allows — your bike is your income tool, so we keep your shifts running.

accessories.a: The charger is included with the bike. Extra battery, delivery bag, phone holder, heavy-duty lock and winter tyres are optional paid add-ons, and you can change them as your routine changes.

weather.q: Are the bikes ready for rain and winter?
weather.a: They're built for daily city use — hydraulic brakes, durable tyres and frames picked to handle rain, cobbles and winter slush. Winter tyres are available as an add-on for the coldest months.

platforms.q: Can I use it for Bolt or Wolt?
platforms.a: Yes — the fleet is set up for city delivery work and suits couriers on any major platform. We're an independent rental service and aren't officially affiliated with Bolt, Wolt or any delivery platform.

hero.heading: Made for couriers, not weekend riders.
hero.lead: rentaro exists for one job: helping delivery couriers start quickly and keep moving. Rent a delivery-built e-bike by the month with charger and service support included. No big purchase, no resale headache, and paid add-ons only if you need extra gear.

startThisWeek.title: Start delivering this week
startThisWeek.copy: Choose your model online, sign the contract at pickup and collect the same week. No long wait, no big purchase before your first shift.

incomeTool.title: Your bike is your income tool
incomeTool.copy: If it's off the road, you're not earning. Service support is built into every plan, so small issues get fixed fast and you stay on the road.

priceFitsHours.title: A price that fits your hours
priceFitsHours.copy: Riding part-time? Start on a flexible 30-day plan. Full-time? A 6 or 12-month plan drops your daily rate. You're never locked into more than you need.

staminaLongShifts.title: Stamina for long shifts
staminaLongShifts.copy: Bikes are picked for delivery work, with optional paid extra batteries for days when you stitch together back-to-back orders across the city.

howItWorks.heading: Choose. Sign. Ride.
howItWorks.lead: Three steps from picking a bike to your first delivery — reserve online, sign at pickup and ride.

models.heading: Bikes that hold up to the work.
models.lead: Hand-picked for delivery shifts. Browse the most popular picks, or see the full fleet.

cta.heading: Ready to start earning?
cta.lead: Choose your rentaro e-bike, pick a plan and reserve in a few steps — charger and service support included from day one.

feedback.metaDescription: Tell rentaro how your completed e-bike rental went.
feedback.title: How was your ride?
feedback.intro: Your feedback helps us improve our bikes and service for couriers.
feedback.commentPlaceholder: What worked well? What could we improve?
feedback.consent: I allow rentaro to publish my feedback as a testimonial using my first name and city.
feedback.invalidTitle: This feedback link is invalid or has expired.
feedback.invalidBody: Reply to the rentaro email if you still want to share feedback.
feedback.notReadyBody: You can leave feedback after your bike has been returned and inspected.
feedback.errorTitle: We couldn't load the feedback form.
feedback.errorBody: Check your connection and try again.
feedback.submitError: Your feedback could not be saved. Please try again.
feedback.noApi: The feedback service is unavailable in this preview.

settings.title: Site settings
settings.showAccessories: Show accessories section on the homepage
settings.showReferAcourier: Show 'refer a courier' card in the portal
settings.showPayConfirm: Show 'pay & confirm your rental' card in the portal

consent.title: Cookies on rentaro
consent.message: We use essential cookies to run the site and, with your consent, analytics cookies to understand how it's used. You can change your choice anytime.

home.title: rentaro — Delivery-ready e-bikes by the month
home.description: Rent a delivery-built e-bike by the month in Tallinn, Riga and Helsinki. 30-day, 6 and 12-month plans with service support and charger included; paid add-ons for courier work.

book.title: Reserve your e-bike — rentaro
book.description: Pick your city, bike and plan, then send a free reservation request — no payment until approval.

accessories.title: Accessories & add-ons for delivery couriers | rentaro
accessories.description: Kit out your shift with optional paid rentaro add-ons — extra batteries, delivery bags, phone holders, heavy-duty locks and more. Charger included with every bike.

faq.title: FAQ — monthly e-bike rental for couriers | rentaro
faq.description: Answers on rentaro monthly e-bike plans, 30-day minimum, deposits, service support, included charger, optional paid add-ons, pickup and contracts for delivery couriers.

models.title: All e-bike models — rentaro
models.description: Browse the full rentaro fleet — delivery-ready e-bikes available on 30-day, 6 or 12-month plans with charger and service support included.

pricing.title: Pricing — monthly e-bike plans for couriers | rentaro
pricing.description: Simple per-30-day pricing for delivery couriers: €5.90/day on 30 days, €4.90/day on 6 months and €3.90/day on 12 months. Charger and service support included; accessories optional.

privacy.title: Privacy policy — rentaro
privacy.description: How rentaro collects, uses and protects your personal data, and your rights under EU data protection law (GDPR) as a delivery-courier rental customer.

terms.title: Terms and conditions — rentaro
terms.description: The terms governing use of the rentaro website and booking an e-bike rental, including bookings, pricing, responsibilities and liability for delivery couriers.

rules.title: Rental rules — rentaro
rules.description: How a rentaro e-bike rental works: the 30-day minimum, deposit, included charger and service support, optional paid add-ons, damage, theft, charging and returns.

bookingStatus.title: Track your booking — rentaro
bookingStatus.description: Check the status of your rentaro e-bike reservation. Enter the booking reference from your confirmation to see your model, plan, city and start date.

couriers.title: E-bike rental for couriers — rentaro
couriers.description: rentaro is monthly e-bike rental built for delivery couriers. Start quickly, ride with charger and service support included, and add paid gear only if needed. Tallinn, Riga and Helsinki.

howItWorks.title: How it works — monthly e-bike rental | rentaro
howItWorks.description: Reserve free, sign the rental agreement, pay your first 30 days plus deposit, then collect a delivery-ready e-bike with charger and service support included.

windDown.title: Rentals closed — rentaro
windDown.description: Rentaro is no longer accepting new rental bookings. Existing customers can continue to use their customer portal.

windDown.heading: New rentals are currently closed
windDown.body: Rentaro is no longer accepting new rental bookings. Existing rentals and already confirmed handovers will continue according to the agreed terms. Customers with an active rental can continue using their customer portal.
windDown.contactLead: For questions concerning an existing rental, contact:
